name: io.github.mshegolev/kibana-mcp
description: Kibana/Elasticsearch MCP — log search, aggregations, index discovery, dashboards.

environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_URL
environmentVariables.description: Direct Elasticsearch URL. If unset, ES requests route through the Kibana Console proxy.

environmentVariables.name: KIBANA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Elasticsearch API key (ApiKey base64(id:api_key) format). Takes priority over Basic auth.

environmentVariables.name: KIBANA_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Basic auth username. Used only when KIBANA_API_KEY is not set.

environmentVariables.name: KIBANA_SSL_VERIFY
environmentVariables.description: Verify SSL certificates (true/false). Set to 'false' for self-signed certs.
